rulings.Case Title: PETER ST. GEME et al VS. CHEVY CHASE BANK FSB, et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 8, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE, N.A.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Hearing required to address competent evidence why payment due January 6, 2009 was tendered. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HANS REINHARDT VS. PRANA EIGHT PROPERTIES LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 8, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT PRANA EIGHT PROPERTIES LLC's MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Continued to November 14, 2012 to be heard by Judge Tsenin. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HANS REINHARDT VS. PRANA EIGHT PROPERTIES LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 8, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT PRANA EIGHT PROPERTIES LLC's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Continued to November 14, 2012 to be heard by Judge Tsenin. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALEXANDER VILDERMAN VS. BANK OF AMERICA N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 8, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANTS BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. AND RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend as to causes of action for Intentional Misrepresentation, Negligent Mispresentation, Negligence, Wrongful Foreclosure, UCL; Overrule - Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress; Sustain without leave to amend as to Breach of Contract. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LOUIS HUI VS. JENNIFER PEDERSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 8, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANT JENNIFER PEDERSON's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. Grant, subject to opposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES A DUGAN VS. ERIKA DUGAN
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 8, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANT ERIKA DUGAN's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Overrule - five days to answer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BAYVIEW PRESERVATION, L.P. VS. JANEEN REIS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 8, 2012, line 6. DEFENDANT JANEEN REIS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Deny, triable issue of material fact re material fact 3. See declaration of Morgan paragraph 5 and declaration of Riley paragraphs 3, 4, 5 and 7. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WAI SHA LIZA HO VS. LOUIS BOLANOS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 8, 2012, line 7. PLAINTIFF WAI HO's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Continued to November 9, 2012. Opposing party to provide courtesy copy no later than 9:30 a.m., November 8, 2012, per San Francisco Local Rule 2.6b. Failure to do so may result in granting Motion for Summary Judgment. = (501/REQ)
